module.name: no-labels
module.description: Disallow labels because they make control flow harder to reason about.

scenarios.name: should allow break without a label inside a loop
scenarios.given: a for loop containing a plain break statement

scenarios.name: should allow continue without a label inside a loop
scenarios.given: a while loop containing a plain continue statement

scenarios.name: should report a labelled statement
scenarios.given: a labelled loop such as outer: for(...) {}
scenarios.then: a noLabels violation is reported on the LabeledStatement

scenarios.name: should report a break targeting a label
scenarios.given: a break outer; statement referencing a label
